mapper.select: select id,title,url,mid, icon, role, visible from t_menu_bs where visible = 1 and pid = '0' and role >= #{role} order by menu_sort asc
select id,title,url,mid, icon from t_menu_bs where visible = 1 and pid = #{pid} and role >= #{role} order by menu_sort asc
select id,title,url,mid, icon, role, visible from t_menu_bs where pid = '0' and role >= #{role} order by menu_sort asc
select id,title,url,mid,icon,role,visible from t_menu_bs where pid = #{pid} and role >= #{role} order by menu_sort asc
mapper.update: update t_menu_bs set menu_sort = #{menuSort} where mid = #{mid}
update t_menu_bs set menu_sort = menu_sort+#{space} where menu_sort > #{menuSort} and pid = #{pid}
